2025-02-19T16:12:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , the slow lane of San Shan Road (East Kowloon Corridor bound) near Pak Tai Street is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2025-02-19T16:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，新山道(往東九龍走廊方向)近北帝街的慢線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2025-02-22T11:56:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of San Shan Road (East Kowloon Corridor bound) near Pak Tai Street which was closed due to watermain emergency works is re-opened to all traffic.
2025-02-22T11:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管緊急維修而封閉的新山道(往東九龍走廊方向)近北帝街的慢線現已解封。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: The 15th National Games Cross Boundary marathon test event
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 第十五屆全運會跨境馬拉松測試賽

2025-02-20T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN:
[The 15th National Games Cross Boundary marathon test event will be held on 23 February (Sunday). Please pay attention to the public transport service arrangements. ]

The marathon test event of the 15th National Games will be held on Sunday. On that day, there will have different arrangements public transport services at Shenzhen Bay Port (SBP) and other land cross boundary control points. Among them, the Transport Department once again reminds public / tourists to pay special to:-

(1) Public Transport Services at SBP: As SBP was temporarily closed at 2am on the day, all public transport services serving the SBP, including franchised buses, green minibuses, cross-boundary coaches and taxis will be gradually resumed services at 11am when the customs clearance at SBP resumes normal; and

(2) Public Transport Services at other ports: During the temporary closure of SBP, cross-boundary passengers are advised to use the East Rail Line to travel to Shenzhen via Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations as much as possible. Residents in Yuen Long, Tuen Mun and Tin Shui Wai may consider taking KMB Routes B1 and B9 to Lok Ma Chau Station and Heung Yuen Wai Control Point, or transfer to the Lok Ma Chau–Huanggang Cross-boundary Shuttle Bus Service at San Tin Interchange to Shenzhen. 

We appeal to cross boundary and local tourist to plan their journey as early as possible. Passengers uses public transport services as much as possible and avoid driving to cross boundary ports during the test event period to avoid traffic congestion and unnecessary delays. Public can visit the Transport Department's website at www. td. gov. hk or the “Hong Kong EasyMobility” mobile application for the latest information. 

The Emergency Transport Coordination Centre of the Transport Department will escalated to the highest level of Joint Steering Mode during the event. The department will work with major public transport operators including the MTR Corporation Limited and franchised bus companies, to closely monitor the traffic and transport conditions on the day and make timely adjustment to services if necessary. 
.
2025-02-20T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN:
【第十五屆全運會跨境馬拉松測試賽周日舉行　注意公共運輸服務安排】

第十五屆全國運動會馬拉松測試賽將於本星期日(2月23日)舉行。當日，深圳灣口岸及其他陸路跨境口岸的公共運輸服務均有不同安排。其中，運輸署再次提醒市民和旅客特別注意：

(一)深圳灣口岸的公共運輸服務：深圳灣口岸當日凌晨2時臨時封閉，所有來往該口岸的公共運輸服務包括專營巴士、專線小巴、跨境直通巴士以及的士，預計於上午11時，當深圳灣口岸恢復通關後逐步恢復營運；

(二)其他口岸的公共運輸服務：在深圳灣口岸臨時封閉期間，跨境旅客應盡量使用東鐵綫經羅湖及落馬洲站前往深圳。而元朗、屯門及天水圍一帶居民，可考慮使用九巴第B1及B9號線前往落馬洲站及香園圍管制站，又或於新田交匯處轉乘皇巴前往深圳。

我們呼籲跨境及本地旅客，及早計劃行程。盡量使用公共運輸服務，避免在有關時段駕車前往各跨境口岸以免交通擠塞及造成不必要的延誤。大家可瀏覽運輸署網頁www.td.gov.hk或「香港出行易」流動應用程式，了解最新資訊。

運輸署緊急事故交通協調中心會在賽事期間提升至最高級別的聯合督導模式運作。署方會聯同主要公共運輸營辦商包括港鐵和專營巴士公司，密切監察當日的交通及運輸情況，並在有需要時及時調整服務。
。

2025-02-22T00:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The cross boundary marathon test event of the 15th National Games will be held tomorrow (February 23). To facilitate the test event, the clearance services at the Shenzhen Bay Port (SBP) will be suspended from 2 am to 11 am. Passengers and vehicles are prohibited from entering the port. In the meantime, temporary control measures will be implemented on Shenzhen Bay Bridge, Kong Sham Western Highway and Ha Tsuen Interchange. During the temporary control period, the Shenzhen Bay Bridge, the Kong Sham Western Highway and Ha Tsuen Interchange will be closed to all vehicular traffic from eastbound and westbound of Yuen Long Highway and Ha Tsuen Road. Cross-boundary vehicles (including good vehicles, passenger vehicles and private cars) with valid closed road permits for the Shenzhen Bay Port may choose to use the Lok Ma Chau, Heung Yuen Wai and Man Kam To boundary control points (BCP) according to the operating hours of the relevant control points on the event day. The above special arrangement will cease upon the re-opening of the Shenzhen Bay Port. Cross-boundary coach services running between Hong Kong and the Mainland via Shenzhen Bay Port as well as local public transport services serving Shenzhen Bay Port, including franchised buses, green minibuses (GMB), Urban and NT Taxis will be suspended during the implementation of the temporary control at the Shenzhen Bay Port on the day of event. The bus companies and GMB operators will display notices at termini and en-route stops of the affected routes to inform affected passengers. During the temporary closure of SBP, travellers should choose other control points to Shenzhen. Cross boundary passengers are advised to use the East Rail Line to travel to Shenzhen via Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau Stations as much as possible. Residents in Yuen Long, Tuen Mun and Tin Shui Wai may consider taking KMB routes B1 and B9 to Lok Ma Chau Station and Heung Yuen Wai Control Point, or transfer to the Lok Ma Chau–Huanggang Cross-boundary Shuttle Bus Service at San Tin Interchange to Shenzhen. The public transport services at SBP are expected to resume operations gradually at 11 am when the SBP resumes clearance. During the suspension of the Shenzhen Bay Port departure service, the Transport Department (TD) expects that the roads leading to the Lok Ma Chau Spurline Station Public Transport Interchange, Lok Ma Chau/Huanggang, Man Kam To and Heung Yuen Wai BCPs, including San Tin Interchange, San Sham Road and Lok Ma Chau Road, etc. , are expected to be busy with traffic. The full clearance services at the Shenzhen Bay Port are expected to resume at around 11am, by then traffic will be expected to be relatively busy. Depending on the prevailing traffic conditions in the different areas, the Police will deploy appropriate manpower and implement corresponding crowd management measures or special traffic arrangements at the affected control points and relevant road sections. The Transport Department appeals to cross boundary and local passengers to plan their journey as early as possible. Passengers uses public transport services as much as possible and avoid driving to cross boundary ports during the test event period to avoid traffic congestion and unnecessary delays. The specific reopening time of SBP may be changed according to the progress of the event. Citizens are advised to pay attention to the latest traffic information released by radio, television or the "Hong Kong eMobility" mobile application.
2025-02-22T00:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 第十五屆全國運動會跨境馬拉松測試賽將於明日（2月23日）舉行。為配合測試賽，深圳灣口岸出入境通關服務於凌晨2時至上午11時暫停，並禁止旅客及車輛進入口岸。與此同時，深圳灣公路大橋、港深西部公路及廈村交匯處將實施臨時管控。臨時管控期間，元朗公路東行、元朗公路西行及廈村路所有車輛禁止駛入深圳灣公路大橋、港深西部公路及廈村交匯處。 持有深圳灣口岸有效封閉道路通行許可證的跨境車輛（貨車、客車及私家車），可於賽事當日，根據相關口岸的通關服務時間，使用落馬洲、香園圍及文錦渡口岸出入境。上述特別安排將於深圳灣口岸重開後終止。 經深圳灣口岸來往香港和內地的跨境直通巴士、來往深圳灣口岸的本地公共交通服務包括專營巴士、專線小巴、市區及新界的士將會在上述時段暫停服務。有關專營巴士公司和專線小巴營辦商會在各路線的站點張貼通告，通知受影響乘客。 在深圳灣口岸臨時封閉期間，旅客應選擇其他口岸前往深圳。跨境旅客應盡量使用東鐵綫經羅湖及落馬洲站前往深圳。而元朗、屯門及天水圍一帶居民，可考慮使用九巴第B1及B9號線前往落馬洲站及香園圍管制站，又或於新田交匯處轉乘皇巴前往深圳。深圳灣口岸的公共運輸服務預計於上午11時，當深圳灣口岸恢復通關後逐步恢復營運。 運輸署預計通往落馬洲支線鐵路站公共運輸交匯處、落馬洲／皇崗、文錦渡及香園圍口岸的道路，包括新田交匯處、新深路及落馬洲路等，會車多繁忙。而深圳灣口岸的通關服務預計於約上午十一時全面恢復正常運作，預計屆時交通亦會比較繁忙。警方將視乎各區的交通情況，部署適當人手及於受影響的口岸和相關路段實施相應的人流管制措施或特別交通安排。 運輸署呼籲跨境及本地旅客及早計劃行程，盡量使用公共運輸服務，避免在有關時段駕車前往各跨境口岸以免交通擠塞及造成不必要的延誤。深圳灣口岸的具體重開時間或因應賽事進程而更改，請市民留意電台、電視台或「香港出行易」流動應用程式發放的最新交通消息。

2025-02-23T11:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The road sections which were temporarily closed due to the marathon test event of the 15th National Games are re-opened to all traffic. Besides, in respect of public transport services, Cross-boundary coach services running between Hong Kong and the Mainland via Shenzhen Bay Port as well as local public transport services serving Shenzhen Bay Port, including franchised buses, green minibuses (GMB), Urban and NT Taxis have gradually resumed normal. We appeal to cross boundary and local tourists to plan their journey as early as possible and allow sufficient time. Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.
2025-02-23T11:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前受第⼗五屆全國運動會跨境馬拉松測試賽臨時封閉的道路現已解封。此外，公共運輸服務⽅⾯，經深圳灣口岸來往香港和內地的跨境直通巴士、來往深圳灣口岸的本地公共交通服務包括專營巴士、專線小巴、市區及新界的士的服務已陸續回復正常。運輸署呼籲跨境及本地旅客及早計劃⾏程，請預留⾜夠時間。請市⺠留意電台、電視台或「⾹港出⾏易」流動應⽤程式發放的最新交通消息。
